info.name: Azure DevOps Git Repositories API
info.description:
REST API for managing Git repositories, branches, commits, pull requests, and pushes in Azure Repos. Supports full programmatic control over source code hosted in Azure DevOps, including creating and reviewing pull requests, managing branches, and browsing repository content.


Contact Support:
 Name: Microsoft Azure DevOps

item.name: Azure DevOps List branches and refs

query.description: (Required) Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.
Prefix filter for ref names (e.g., 'heads/' returns branches)
Whether to include _links
Whether to include commit status information
Whether to prioritize branches created by the current user
Return only the latest status for each ref
Maximum number of refs to return
Continuation token for paging

variable.description: (Required) GUID or name of the repository

request.description: Returns a list of refs (branches and tags) for a repository. Supports filtering by a prefix string (e.g., "heads/" for branches, "tags/" for tags).

response.name: List of refs returned successfully

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Azure DevOps Update a pull request

query.description: (Required) Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

variable.description: (Required) GUID or name of the repository
(Required) Numeric ID of the pull request to update

request.description: Updates a pull request. Use this to change the title, description, status (abandon or complete), target branch, and auto-complete settings. To complete a PR, set status to 'completed' and provide a lastMergeSourceCommit.

response.name: Pull request updated successfully
